description: lockstep manifest for socket-registry. socket-registry is the fleet's canonical authority for shared skills, workflows, hooks, and scaffolding — it doesn't currently port from an upstream or track feature-parity against an external spec, so this manifest ships empty. Present so sync-scaffolding doesn't flag registry as missing lockstep infrastructure and so future lock-step rows (e.g. if registry ever tracks an upstream) have a home.
